message:
Add placeholder windows and background tab caching

- Add configurable option to cache background tabs (Settings > Cache Background Tabs)
- When enabled, cycles through background tabs after sidebar dismissal to capture screenshots
- For windows/tabs without cached screenshots, generates placeholder window image with:
  - macOS-style window chrome (dark mode)
  - Traffic light buttons (red/yellow/green)
  - Window title in title bar
  - App icon centered in content area
- Placeholders shown for both sidebar thumbnails and preview panel

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+title: "9:12:18 PM - December 31, 2025"
+date: 2026-01-01T03:12:18.164Z
+timestamp: 1767237138164
+---
+
+## Project Notes
+
+Winby already has the best available solution: cache tab screenshots when active, use cache when backgrounded, fall back to app icon. The `CGSHWCaptureWindowList` private API handles minimized/other-space windows but can't help with background tabs.
